title: Why AI Models Pause to Think: Test Time Compute Explained
summary: Test time compute is a technique where AI models allocate additional computational resources during inference to improve accuracy on harder problems. The approach involves deliberate thinking steps, including chain of thought reasoning, which helps language models solve more complex tasks by pausing and reasoning before generating responses.
